title: Earthy Velvety Uruguayan Macaroni Bake
description: A rich and comforting Uruguayan-inspired macaroni bake, made with a variety of earthy vegetables and a creamy bechamel sauce, perfect for a hangover cure or a cozy night in.
instructions: Preheat pressure cooker to high pressure.
Sauté the chopped onion, grated carrots, and chopped celery in olive oil until softened.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the macaroni, bechamel sauce, grated cheddar cheese, and grated Parmesan cheese to the pressure cooker.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Close the pressure cooker lid and cook at high pressure for 10 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 5 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Stir the macaroni bake and adjust seasoning if needed.
Transfer the macaroni bake to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the macaroni is heated through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
